name: LSM6DS Accelerometer/Gyroscope Sensor
description: The `lsm6ds` motion platform allows you to use your LSM6DS Accelerometer/Gyroscope ([datasheet](https://www.st.com/resource/en/datasheet/lsm6ds3tr-c.pdf)) sensors with ESPHome. The [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) is required to be set up in your configuration for this sensor to work.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: Manually specify the I²C address of the sensor. Defaults to `0x6A`, on some boards it may need to be set to `0x6B`.

config_entries.label: Accelerometer Odr
config_entries.description: The output data rate of the accelerometer. One of `OFF`, `12_5HZ`, `26HZ`, `52HZ`, `104HZ`, `208HZ`, `416HZ`, `833HZ`, `1666HZ`, `3332HZ`, `6664HZ`. Defaults to `104HZ`.

config_entries.label: Accelerometer Range
config_entries.description: The full-scale range of the accelerometer. One of `2G`, `4G`, `8G`, `16G`. Defaults to `4G`.

config_entries.label: Gyroscope Odr
config_entries.description: The output data rate of the gyroscope. One of `OFF`, `12_5HZ`, `26HZ`, `52HZ`, `104HZ`, `208HZ`, `416HZ`, `833HZ`, `1666HZ`, `3332HZ`, `6664HZ`. Defaults to `208HZ`.

config_entries.label: Gyroscope Range
config_entries.description: The full-scale range of the gyroscope. One of `125DPS`, `250DPS`, `500DPS`, `1000DPS`, `2000DPS`. Defaults to `2000DPS`.
